current_policy: KYC review for high-risk customers is performed every 24 months
required_policy:
Section 4.2 - KYC Review Frequency
Financial institutions must perform KYC customer reviews every 12 months for high-risk customers.

Section 5.1 - Suspicious Activity Monitoring
Institutions must monitor suspicious transactions daily and report high-risk activity within 48 hours.

current_policy: Evidence and audit logs are retained for 3 years
required_policy:
Section 6.3 - Evidence Retention
Compliance teams must retain evidence and audit logs for at least 5 years.
